Activities: Recipient of the William Tao Prize. Established by William K.Y. Tao, PE, alumnus, emeritus trustee and affiliate professor at Washington University, the William Tao Prize provides an annual cash award to students who have demonstrated excellence in the understanding and application of building systems in architecture, including illumination, electrical and mechanical engineering, and energy-efficient design.

School Name: Savannah College of Art and Design
Degree Name: Bachelor of Fine Arts in Architecture
